config.title: Kursy walut #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_s #include "50200"
#ifdef APPCONFIG_FIND_KLIENT_GUS function fopen if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GET_KURSY_WALUT).disable = true dim pGlobProfAutoKurs: set pGlobProfAutoKurs = nx_get_globprofile_obj(GLOBPROF_AUTO_POBIERZ_KURSY_WALUT) if not pGlobProfAutoKurs is nothing then if pGlobProfAutoKurs.Wartosc = "1" then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GET_KURSY_WALUT).disable = false end if end if end function #endif
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(7,page_.root.curKupnoWal,page_.root.pWalN,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(8,page_.root.curSprzedWal,page_.root.pWalN,1) QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(9,page_.root.curAverageWal,page_.root.pWalN,1)
function create_infotext(byref curKurs) dim strWalZ : strWalZ = "" dim strWalNa : strWalNa = ""
if not page_.root.pWalZ is nothing then strWalZ = page_.root.pWalZ.strSkrot end if
if not page_.root.pWalN is nothing then strWalNa = page_.root.pWalN.strSkrot end if
create_infotext = doc_.afc.display.quantity(page_.root.curMnoznik,strWalZ,2) + " to " +_ doc_.afc.display.quantity(curKurs,strWalNa,4) end function
function c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_KUP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_KUP##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.text = create_infotext(page_.root.curKupnoWal) end function
function c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_SPRZ##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_SPRZ##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.text = create_infotext(page_.root.curSprzedWal) end function
function c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_AVG##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_AVG##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.text = create_infotext(page_.root.curAverageWal) end function
function reverse
dim strMessage:strMessage = ""
if page_.root.isnew() then strMessage = "Musisz najpierw zapisac biezący kurs aby na jego podstawie utworzyc odwrotny." end if
if trans_.isdirty() then strMessage = "Musisz najpierw zapisac biezący kurs aby na jego podstawie utworzyc odwrotny." end if
if strMessage <> "" then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , strMessage exit function end if
dim id:id = page_.root.idobj dim pSubTrans: set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran()
dim hli:set hli = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5KURSWALUT , 0 , USAGE_EDIT) if hli is nothing then exit function end if
dim form : set form = doc_.getpagehli(hli) if not form is nothing then dim source:set source = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KURSWALUT , id)
form.root.dData = source.dData
set form.root.pWalZ = source.pWalN set form.root.pWalN = source.pWalZ
form.root.curKupnoWal = doc_.afc.convert.roundn(1/source.curKupnoWal,4) form.root.curSprzedWal = doc_.afc.convert.roundn(1/source.curSprzedWal,4)
form.root.curMnoznik = source.curMnoznik
form.domodalauto end if
set pSubTrans = nothing
end function
function pobierz_kurs_walut() if page_.root.isnew() then trans_.message 1002, 0, "Formularz musi być najpierw zapisany" exit function end if
dim pPerf: set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa pobieranie kursów walut...") dim pModule: set pModule = doc_.getmodule(PAGE_MODULE_CHECK_KURS_WALUT) pModule.get_kurs set pPerf = nothing end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
XFDATEFIELD_COLSPAN(Data,dData,1,false) QXR_EDIT_REF(Kurs z,-1,SIZE_FOR_JEDNOSTKA,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA,pWalZ,strSkrot,CRSR_N5JEDNOSTKA_WG_NAZWY_WALUTY,1) QXR_EDIT_REF(na,-1,SIZE_FOR_JEDNOSTKA,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA,pWalN,strSkrot,CRSR_N5JEDNOSTKA_WG_NAZWY_WALUTY,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
#ifndef _IOW
XFREQHUMANNAMECELL(Kupno) XFCURRENCY_CUSTOMCELL(7,14,4)
QXC_INFO_CUSTOM(,CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_KUP,2)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
XFREQHUMANNAMECELL(Sprzedaż) XFCURRENCY_CUSTOMCELL(8,14,4)
QXC_INFO_CUSTOM(,CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_SPRZ,2)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
#endif
XFREQHUMANNAMECELL(Średni) XFCURRENCY_CUSTOMCELL(9,14,4)
QXC_INFO_CUSTOM(,CTRLID_KURSINFOTEXT_AVG,2)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXR_CURRENCY_FIELD(Mnożnik,-1,8,4,,curMnoznik,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,14,Odwróć,varFunction="reverse")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_FIND_KLIENT_GUS
QXE_BUTTON(CTRLID_GET_KURSY_WALUT,14,Pobierz kurs na jutro,varFunction="pobierz_kurs_walut")
#endif
QXF_END
